input: Decision record: Migrate database to PostgreSQL 16. Owner: Senior DBA Maria. Start date: Monday 9am. Deadline: Friday 5pm. No conditions. Maria confirmed she has admin access and the maintenance window is approved.

evidence: True executable decision. All four elements plus authority and resource confirmation.
